parents.subject: LU-17638 util: remove newer lnetctl export handling

commit.subject: LU-17638 lnet: debug route export breakage
commit.message:
LU-17638 lnet: debug route export breakage

Revert bit by bit to find out why maloo testbed breaks things.
This time its the route code reverted.

Change-Id: I92c105d07a877c6ec3e1d6279f08c9eb7a951e03
Signed-off-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
